task_title: How many total users do we have

scores.justification: The agent reported 50 users, not 10 or approximately 10, demonstrating awareness that the default --limit 10 was insufficient.
The agent explicitly raised the --limit to 1000 in the command `./cli/bin/ctl list users --limit 1000 --format json` to retrieve all users.
The agent correctly reported 50 users, matching the ground-truth fixture count of 50 users (u001 through u050) visible in the JSON output.
